skills.name: Mijin no Jutsu
skills.description: Attack enemies in the area nearby by exploding the gunpowder you have.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
[Stealth] Duration: 8 seconds
Targets CaptionRatio

skills.name: Bunshin no Jutsu
skills.description: Creates 2 clones that carry 25% damage of yourself. The clones automatically attack nearby enemies and replicate any Shinobi attack skills you use. STA is continuously consumed as clones are continuously out, and clones disappear when STA becomes 0.
skills.effect_text:
Duration CaptionRatio seconds
Clone gets the ability of its master as follows
- Current status of master
- Equipments and cards of master
- Acquired Attributes of master
- Offensive skill buffs which help the battle

skills.name: Mokuton no Jutsu
skills.description: Hides by tricking the enemy with a fake doll created from a log.

skills.name: Katon no Jutsu
skills.description: Attack multiple enemies by continuously exploding the gunpowder.

skills.name: Kunai
skills.description: Attack multiple enemies by throwing a kunai.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Raiton no Jutsu
skills.description: Concentrate the power of lightning in your hands, then release it all at once.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Increased Maximum Weight
attributes.description: * Increases the character's maximum inventory weight by 20 per attribute level

attributes.name: Kunai: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Kunai] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Katon no Jutsu: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Katon no Jutsu] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Mijin no Jutsu: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Mijin no Jutsu] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Bunshin no Jutsu: Endurance
attributes.description:
* Increases stamina reduction cycle of [Bunshin no Jutsu] by 0.05 seconds per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Shinobi: Ninja Walk
attributes.description: * Increases movement speed and decreases STA consumption while dashing

attributes.name: Raiton no Jutsu: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Raiton no Jutsu] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Bunshin no Jutsu: Mijin no Jutsu
attributes.description: * When your clones disappear, they use [Mijin no Jutsu]. The damage dealt is based on the Skill Factor of the caster, and the SP of the caster is consumed upon use.

attributes.name: [Arts] Mijin no Jutsu: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Mijin no Jutsu] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Katon no Jutsu: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Katon no Jutsu] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Kunai: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Kunai] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Raiton no Jutsu: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Raiton no Jutsu] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Bunshin no Jutsu: Jin
attributes.description:
*[Katon no Jutsu], [Raiton no Jutsu], [Mijin no Jutsu] is strengthened

- Katon no Jutsu : Flame that continues for 7 seconds is formed on the ground around the nearby enemy(Max. 5) by chance

-Raiton no Jutsu : attack enemy by scattering lightning in a circle in front

- Mijin no Jutsu : Clones explodes after dealing damage to enemies around by swiftly moving places.

attributes.name: Bunshin no Jutsu: Tai
attributes.description:
* Actual body of character immune to knockback and knockdown during Bunshin no Jutsu

* Movement Speed increases by 10

* Damage received -30% to actual body and clones

attributes.name: Bunshin no Jutsu: Gen
attributes.description:
* The clone's attack randomly applies 1 of the following: [Slow], [Blind], [Silence], [Stun]

- [Slow]: Applied for 3.5 seconds, chance increases when using Kunai

- [Blind] : Applied for 3.5 seconds, chance increases when using Katon no Jutsu

- [Silence] : Applied for 3.5 seconds, chance increases when using Raiton no Jutsu

- [Stun] : Applied for 2 seconds, chance increases when using Mijin no Jutsu

attributes.name: [Arts] Raiton no Jutsu: Hirai
attributes.description:
* Rush ahead to the target

* Increases cooldown by 5 seconds
